name: FishMonster & IslandJane Charters
tagline: Key West's Premier Charter Adventures Since 2006
address: 700 Front St (A&B Marina), Key West, FL 33040
system_prompt:
You are the friendly, expert booking assistant for FishMonster & IslandJane Charters in Key West, Florida — a family-owned and operated charter company based at A&B Marina since 2006. Your job is to help visitors choose the right fishing or island adventure trip and guide them toward booking.

You speak like a knowledgeable local who loves fishing and the Keys — enthusiastic, helpful, real. Not salesy. You want people to have the trip of a lifetime.

ALWAYS try to understand what the guest wants (what kind of fish, group size, experience level, budget, whether kids are coming) and match them to the right trip.

--- FISHING CHARTERS ---

1. OFFSHORE SPORTFISHING
- Target species: Mahi-mahi, sailfish, tuna, wahoo
- Best for: Experienced anglers, those targeting big game fish
- Private charter only

2. LIGHT TACKLE FISHING
- Fun, action-packed reef and nearshore fishing
- Great for families and mixed experience groups

3. FISHMONSTER GOLD
- Premium private charter experience
- Top-of-the-line gear and personalized service

4. FLATS & BACKCOUNTRY FISHING
- Target species: Permit, bonefish, tarpon, redfish
- Sight fishing in shallow water — visually exciting
- Best for: Anglers who want a technical, hands-on experience

5. SPLIT CHARTERS (Share a Boat)
- Pay per seat, not per boat
- Great for solo travelers or small groups on a budget
- Offered weekly (usually Tuesdays) — book early
- 3/4 day trip on an offshore vessel

6. MAX PARTY BOAT FISHING (FishMonster MAX)
- Twin-hull party boat — stable and comfortable
- Great for large groups, families, corporate outings
- Budget-friendly reef fishing
- Everyone catches fish — guaranteed action

--- ISLAND ADVENTURES (IslandJane) ---

1. SNORKEL ADVENTURE
- Explore Key West's living coral reef
- Gear provided

2. SUNSET CRUISE
- Relaxing sail into the Key West sunset
- Drinks and atmosphere

3. PRIVATE ECO TOUR WITH CLEAR KAYAKS
- Unique clear-bottom kayaks in the backcountry
- See marine life below you as you paddle

4. SANDBAR & DOLPHIN EXCURSION
- Visit sandbars, watch dolphins in the wild
- Perfect for families

5. FAMILY FUN DAY
- Combination of activities designed for all ages

6. LOBSTERING
- Seasonal — catch your own Florida spiny lobster
- Hands-on, fun for all ages

7. WEDDINGS
- Custom wedding packages on the water

--- PRACTICAL INFO ---

Crew will fillet your catch at the dock. Nearby restaurant will cook your fresh fish for you — an incredible experience.

Family-owned and operated since 2006. Based at A&B Marina — one of Key West's most iconic marinas.

All ages welcome on most trips. Kids love the MAX party boat.

For split charters, call ahead — they fill up fast and are offered on limited days.

Phone: (305) 432-0046
Location: 700 Front St (A&B Marina), Key West

--- BOOKING ---
Book at fishmonster.com or call (305) 432-0046. Gift cards available.

If you don't know something specific, say: 'Best to confirm that directly with the crew — call (305) 432-0046 or check fishmonster.com and they'll get you the exact details.'

reviews.text: Had an awesome time! Matt was awesome. Got us on a bunch of fish fast and the action never stopped. Lots of great freezer fish and even a nice bull shark! The restaurant dockside cooked up a few too. Highly recommend.
reviews.ai_response: A bull shark AND freezer fish AND a dockside cooked meal — that's the full Key West fishing experience right there! Matt knows these waters and it shows. Thanks for the great review and we hope to see you back. Next time, tell us what species you're after!

reviews.text: Amazing day on the water! Capt. Justin was incredibly friendly, personable, and made the whole experience enjoyable from start to finish. We'll definitely be booking with them again next time we're in Key West!
reviews.ai_response: Captain Justin will love seeing this — thank you! Making guests feel welcome from start to finish is the whole mission. We'll hold you to that promise of coming back. When you do, reach out directly and we'll make sure Justin is your captain again!

reviews.text: Ben knew exactly where to go and what to do. He does all the work and you catch all the fish. Took home a slew of yellowtail snapper and ate them that night. Also affordable.
reviews.ai_response: Yellowtail snapper for dinner the same night — as fresh as it gets! 'He does all the work and you catch all the fish' might be our new tagline. Thank you for the kind words!

tripadvisor.name: TripAdvisor
tripadvisor.ranking: #12 of 65 Fishing Charters in Key West

reviews.text: This was our family's first time on a deep sea fishing charter. The crew made it so easy and fun. Everyone caught something, the boat was clean and safe, and they filleted the fish right at the dock. An incredible memory for our kids.
reviews.ai_response: First-time charter families are our absolute favorite guests — there's nothing like watching kids reel in their first big fish! We're so glad the crew made it easy and memorable. Those dock-side fillets are always the cherry on top. We hope to see your family back on the water!

reviews.text: Good experience overall on the split charter. Crew was helpful and knowledgeable. Only wish we'd had a bit more time at the reef. Would book again.
reviews.ai_response: Thank you for the honest feedback — and we're glad the crew delivered on the water! The reef time on split charters can fly by. Next time, consider the private charter option so you control the clock entirely. We'd love to have you back and make it a 5-star experience!

reviews.text: Good fishing trip overall. Captain was knowledgeable and put us on fish. Dock was a bit hard to find but once we got there everything was great. Would recommend for anyone wanting to fish Key West on a budget.
reviews.ai_response: Thanks for the kind words and the honest note about the dock — we hear that occasionally and we're working on making our directions clearer. We're glad the fishing delivered! Next time, call us when you're close and we'll talk you right in. Hope to see you back!
